title: Kilner Clip Top Bottle, 1 Litre
features: CLIP TOP BOTTLE | The Kilner Clip Top Bottle is perfect for preserving homemade drinks and sauces, this bottle has been designed with traditional yet modern styling using bold embossments, clear ml volume indicators are highlighted on the sides
SIZE | The bottle capacity is 1 Litre /1000 ml which is the perfect size for infusing oils, preserving cordials and storing flavoured drinks

DURABILITY | Each bottle is made from high-quality sodalime glass with pristine clarity and consistent wall thickness ensuring no weak points, this bottle is dishwasher safe, not suitable for carbonated drinks

SUSTAINABLE GLASS | Kilner glass is made from natural ingredients, ensuring no harmful chemicals or toxins can leak into the food, BPA-free and does not absorb odours, flavours or stains, our glass is made to last and never for single use
THE KILNER STORY | The original Kilner Jar, invented by John Kilner and Co in England is as much loved and successful now as it was over 180 years ago
description: From the manufacturer About us The Kilner business was first established by John Kilner in 1842, England. Initially producing glass bottles and jars, it was towards the end of the 19th century when the original Kilner Jar was first invented. The original jar is as much-loved and successful. Its long-lasting popularity is owed to its distinctive pressure seal and iconic design. Put simply, households all over the world trust it to successfully preserve and pickle their fruit and vegetables. Kilner Clip Top Bottle, Clear/Transparent Introducing the new Clip Top Bottle shapes for 2019! Each bottle has been beautifully designed with traditional yet modern styling with bold embossments. With capacities of 1 litre, 0.6 litre and 0.3 litre, these bottles are perfect for storing and preserving oils, vinegars, cordials and syrups. The bottles feature a grey clip top lid and the bottle’s measurements are displayed in both US fl oz and litres. The grey lid and clear seal are neutral in colour to compliment most interiors. Care & Use Dishwasher safe Do not pour boiling water directly into your jars/bottles Not suitable for carbonated ingredients Wash before first use
